headline: Morningstar Warns Of 30% Crash In AI Stocks, Is It Time To Sell Micron?
summary: Morningstar is warning investors to brace for a reckoning in AI stocks, with memory-chip names sitting on the biggest gains facing the most downside. In a Bloomberg TV segment, Morningstar director of research Lorraine Tan warned that a large slice of AI names could give back 20% to 30% before they become buyable again. For ... headline: Meta Declares War on the Cloud Giants, and Chip Stocks Pay the Price
summary: Meta's surprise move into cloud computing sent its shares up nearly 9% and rattled the neocloud upstarts, while chip stocks broadly retreated as Wall Street rotated into software. Michael Burry doubled down on his AI short, central bankers debated AI's uncertain economic impact at the ECB's Sintra forum, and oil eased further as US-Iran talks continued in Qatar.
